title: Endpoint Security alert received
message: INC-2026-00431 reports Third-party application detected on endpoint on END-LAP-233.

payload.current_state: EDR detected RemoteAssistX on END-LAP-233, but the asset has a time-bound vendor support exception for APP-RA-X.
payload.requested_outcome: Verify the exception, reject unsafe removal, preserve evidence, and escalate only if the exception is invalid.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Check application exception registry before containment, never remove exception-approved tools automatically, preserve EDR evidence, and require security approval.

payload.title: Endpoint Third-Party Application Exception Handling
controls: Query the exception registry for the detected application and endpoint.
Do not uninstall an approved exception app during first response.
Preserve EDR evidence and business justification.
Require security approval before quarantine or removal.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Verified approved vendor tool exception and preserved EDR evidence.
Matched application hash to exception registry before action.
Escalated exception review without endpoint mutation.
Technician uninstalled the vendor support tool before checking exception registry.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: approved vendor work stopped and the exception audit trail was broken.

items.summary: Exception was expired for a similar endpoint.
items.notes: Escalated to security incident response for containment approval.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history removed the app before exception lookup; SOP requires exception verification before containment.

blocked_precedent.summary: Technician uninstalled the vendor support tool before checking exception registry.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: approved vendor work stopped and the exception audit trail was broken.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Third-party application detected on endpoint.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Third-party application detected on endpoint.
sop_controls: Query the exception registry for the detected application and endpoint.
Do not uninstall an approved exception app during first response.
Preserve EDR evidence and business justification.
Require security approval before quarantine or removal.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-SECAPP-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Reject automatic removal and preserve evidence because APP-RA-X has an approved exception for END-LAP-233.

payload.summary: Reject automatic removal and preserve evidence because APP-RA-X has an approved exception for END-LAP-233.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: verify EXC-4472, attach EDR evidence, notify security approver, do not uninstall RemoteAssistX.
payload.estimated_effect: No endpoint state change occurs; approved exception remains visible and the incident is escalated for security review.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Confirm exception EXC-4472 is active and scoped to END-LAP-233.
Confirm RemoteAssistX hash matches the exception record.
Confirm no quarantine or uninstall action was executed.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to security incident response if the hash, user, or endpoint does not match the exception.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

validation_steps: Confirm exception EXC-4472 is active and scoped to END-LAP-233.
Confirm RemoteAssistX hash matches the exception record.
Confirm no quarantine or uninstall action was executed.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for Third-party application detected on endpoint.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for Third-party application detected on endpoint.
payload.expected_safe_effect: No endpoint state change occurs; approved exception remains visible and the incident is escalated for security review.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Operator rejected remediation
message: Operator rejected automatic removal because exception EXC-4472 is active for END-LAP-233 and RemoteAssistX; evidence was preserved with no mock execution.
